articles.title: GM cutting hundreds of salaried IT workers as it trims costs, evaluates needs - CNBC
articles.description: General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations.
articles.content:
DETROIT General Motors is laying off hundreds of salaried employees in its information technology operations as the automaker reevaluates its workforce needs and cuts costs, CNBC has learned.

Discord on Monday unveiled Nitro Rewards, which gives Nitro subscribers access to offers from other gaming and lifestyle brands for no additional cost.
